---
title: "DAY X: DAY TITLE HERE"
execute:
  echo: false
---

# Day Overview

Brief summary of the day's focus, learning objectives, or key themes.

## Table of Contents

- [Section 1](01-section.qmd)
- [Section 2](02-section.qmd)
- [Activity](05-activity.qmd)
- [Major Activity](13-major-activity.qmd)

<div class=workbook_callout>Day-level workbook or activity callout. (Optional)</div>
<div class=neave_note>Optional Neave note or day-level commentary.</div>
